skills.name: Introduction to Machine Learning
skills.description: Overview of machine learning, its applications, and the role of ML engineers.
skills.notes: Covers what ML is, types of ML (supervised, unsupervised, reinforcement), and real-world use cases across industries.

skills.name: Mathematical Foundations
skills.description: Core math concepts required to understand and implement machine learning algorithms.
skills.notes: Includes linear algebra (vectors, matrices), calculus (gradients, derivatives), probability, and statistics.

skills.name: Probability & Statistics
skills.description: Statistical methods for analyzing data and making predictions.
skills.notes: Includes distributions, Bayes theorem, variance, hypothesis testing, and descriptive/inferential statistics.

skills.name: Programming (Python)
skills.description: Using Python for implementing machine learning models and data processing.
skills.notes: Covers variables, data structures, loops, functions, and libraries like NumPy, Pandas, and Matplotlib.

skills.name: Data Collection & Cleaning
skills.description: Gathering and preparing data for machine learning workflows.
skills.notes: Includes data sources (APIs, databases), handling missing values, outliers, and data transformation.

skills.name: Feature Engineering
skills.description: Transforming raw data into meaningful features to improve model performance.
skills.notes: Includes normalization, encoding, feature selection, dimensionality reduction (PCA).

skills.name: Supervised Learning
skills.description: Learning from labeled data to make predictions.
skills.notes: Includes classification and regression algorithms such as linear regression, logistic regression, SVM, decision trees, and random forests.

skills.name: Unsupervised Learning
skills.notes: Includes clustering (K-means), hierarchical clustering, and dimensionality reduction techniques.

skills.name: Model Evaluation
skills.description: Assessing model performance and ensuring generalization.
skills.notes: Includes metrics like accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, ROC-AUC, and validation techniques like cross-validation.

skills.name: Deep Learning
skills.description: Advanced machine learning using neural networks with multiple layers.
skills.notes: Includes neural networks, backpropagation, activation functions, and frameworks like TensorFlow and PyTorch.

skills.name: Deep Learning Architectures
skills.description: Specialized neural network architectures for different types of data.
skills.notes: Includes CNNs (computer vision), RNNs (sequential data), transformers, and attention mechanisms.

skills.name: Natural Language Processing (NLP)
skills.description: Processing and analyzing text data using machine learning techniques.
skills.notes: Includes tokenization, embeddings, transformers, sentiment analysis, and language models.

skills.name: Advanced ML & Generative Models
skills.description: Advanced topics including generative AI and modern ML techniques.
skills.notes: Includes GANs, autoencoders, explainable AI, reinforcement learning, and cutting-edge research trends.
